module.name: prefer-result-return
module.description: Prefer Result-style return values instead of throw statements to make error flows explicit and composable.

scenarios.name: should allow a function that returns a Result-like value on failure
scenarios.given: a function that returns { ok: false, error } instead of throwing

scenarios.name: should report a throw statement inside a non-constructor function
scenarios.given: a function that throws a new Error to signal failure
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the throw statement

scenarios.name: should report a throw in an arrow function
scenarios.given: an arrow function that throws on an invalid condition
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the throw statement
